title: Apply for Motorcycle Single Vehicle Approval (MSVA)
body: "You must apply for a Motorcycle Single Vehicle Approval (MSVA) inspection if you have a moped, motorcycle, 3 wheeler or quadricycle that has not been type-approved to European standards.  You must also apply for MSVA if your vehicle has been radically altered or built using a mixture of parts from previously registered vehicles. This includes:   amateur built vehicles rebuilt vehicles vehicles converted to a different wheelplan    You cannot use your motorcycle on the road until it has passed the MSVA inspection.   How much it costs  The fee will depend on the type of vehicle you want to approve and whether or not the test is within working hours.  You can pay online when you apply by:   credit or debit card using a pre-funded account     Check the MSVA application fees.   Apply for MSVA online  You’ll need:   the vehicle identification number (VIN) or chassis number your username and password if you’ve used the service before   You can register in the service if you’ve not used it before.  Once you’ve started your application you can save your form and complete it later.  Start now   What happens next  DVSA will send you an email to let you know the outcome. You’ll usually get a response within 10 working days.  Other ways to apply  The quickest way to apply is to apply online. You can apply by post if you cannot use the online service.  How to apply by post  Download and fill in the application form.             MSVA application form    PDF, 1.68 MB, 4 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email accessible-formats@dvsa-publishing.zendesk.com. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.      Read the  guidance on filling in the MSVA application form  (PDF, 584 KB, 4 pages) before filling in the form.  Where to send the form  Send the application by post.   DVSAApprovals TeamThe EllipsePadley RoadSwansea SA1 8AN   Help with your application  Contact DVSA if you need help with your application.   enquiries@dvsa.gov.uk Telephone: 0300 200 1188 Monday to Friday, 7:30am to 6pm Find out about call charges   "
